commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=366b30c32d16c6995762e309bf2c983818b7cb75)
commands.review_summary:
The PR extends `openclaw secrets audit` to scan adjacent `openclaw.json` backup artifacts for plaintext secret fields, adds focused audit fixtures, and updates the secrets CLI docs.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main has no config-backup enumeration in `runSecretsAudit`, and the PR fixtures describe a clear `.bak` plaintext case, but this read-only review did not execute it.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof, and the patch needs focused coverage fixes before normal maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: fix(secrets): audit config backup secret residues
target.body:
## Summary
- extend secrets audit to scan adjacent openclaw.json backups for plaintext secret fields
- ignore SecretRefs found only in backups for resolvability and shadowing checks
- document backup residue coverage in the secrets CLI docs

## Real behavior proof
- Added a fixture where active config uses a SecretRef and openclaw.json.bak.1 contains a plaintext provider apiKey; runSecretsAudit scans the backup and reports PLAINTEXT_FOUND for that file/path.
- Added a fixture where openclaw.json.pre-update contains a missing SecretRef; audit scans the file but does not report REF_UNRESOLVED for backup-only refs.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/secrets/audit.test.ts
- git diff --check
- pnpm docs:list (fails locally: Corepack cannot find matching keyid under Node.js v20.13.1)
target.author: jynbil1

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
